name: Business context questions
description: A few intake questions so the session starts with the right context.

fields.label: What would make this session a success?
fields.placeholder: The decision or problem you want to work through.
fields.helpText: The more specific, the more we can get done.

name: Pet pre-visit information
description: Client-provided notes about your pet ahead of the visit.

fields.label: What would you like us to look at?
fields.placeholder: Describe what you've noticed and when it started.
fields.helpText: This is client-provided context, not a medical record.

fields.label: When did you first notice it?

name: Intake & consent acknowledgement
description: A short intake and an acknowledgement before your first session.

fields.label: What brings you here right now?
fields.placeholder: Whatever feels relevant — there are no wrong answers.
fields.helpText: Client-provided notes. Share only what you're comfortable with.

fields.label: Have you worked with a therapist before?
I understand this booking is a session request and acknowledge the provider's booking terms.

name: Goals & injury history
description: Pre-visit information so we can tailor your first session safely.

fields.label: What are your main goals?
fields.placeholder: e.g. Build strength, train for a 10k, general fitness.

fields.label: Any injuries or conditions we should know about?
fields.placeholder: Client-provided notes — leave blank if none.
fields.helpText: This is not a medical assessment.

name: Mutual NDA acknowledgement
description: A simple agreement acknowledgement before we discuss sensitive details.

fields.label: Full legal name
fields.placeholder: As you'd like it to appear on the acknowledgement.

fields.label: I acknowledge that information shared in this session is treated as confidential by both parties.
